#+TITLE: Timestamp parsing fixtures

* TODO simple-active

* TODO active-with-time
SCHEDULED: <2026-05-07 Thu 10:00>

* TODO time-range
SCHEDULED: <2026-05-07 Thu 10:00-12:00>

* TODO date-range
SCHEDULED: <2026-05-07 Thu>--<2026-05-10 Sun>

* TODO inactive-in-body
[2026-05-07 Thu] should not appear in active timestamps.

* TODO active-in-body
Body has <2026-06-01 Mon> active and <2026-07-01 Wed 09:00> with time.

* TODO repeater-cumulate
SCHEDULED: <2026-05-07 Thu +1d>

* TODO repeater-catchup
SCHEDULED: <2026-05-07 Thu ++1w>

* TODO repeater-restart
SCHEDULED: <2026-05-07 Thu .+1m>

* TODO warning-only
DEADLINE: <2026-05-20 Wed -3d>

* TODO repeater-and-warning
DEADLINE: <2026-05-20 Wed +1w -1d>

SCHEDULED: <2020-06-15 Mon +1y>
